assistant.title: Assistants
assistant.chooseRoleDesc: The browser section is now condensed into 4 core assistants for page briefing, research and verification, structured extraction, and task execution. The general section handles broader writing, communication, and creative work.
assistant.deleteConfirmDesc: Deleting this assistant removes the messages in its {{count}} topics and reclaims attachments only referenced by those topics. Continue?
assistant.name: Name
assistant.selectDesc: Select an assistant instance to manage the topic collection that shares its configuration. New assistants can be created from browser-scenario or general presets.
assistant.editDesc: Update the assistant’s prompt and settings.
assistant.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional: what this assistant is good at
assistant.tagsHint: Press Enter or comma to add a tag, or click an existing tag to select it
assistant.tagsInputPlaceholder: Type a tag and press Enter or comma

store.title: Assistant Store
store.description: Browse builtin presets and your presets, then preview before adding them as assistants.
store.searchPlaceholder: Search presets, descriptions, prompts, or tags…
store.presetEditorDesc: User presets only store the current schema and do not carry browser-context overrides.
store.enableWebSearchDesc: Assistants created from this preset enable model-side web search by default.
store.enableGenerateImageDesc: Assistants created from this preset can generate images by default.
store.enableMemoryDesc: Assistants created from this preset may use global memory by default.
store.mcpDesc: Controls how assistants created from this preset choose MCP tools by default.
store.mcpDisabledDesc: Disable MCP for assistants created from this preset.
store.mcpAutoDesc: Automatically choose available MCP tools for assistants created from this preset.
store.mcpManualDesc: Manually choose which MCP servers are available by default.
store.noMcpServersDesc: There are no enabled MCP servers yet. Add them in Settings first.
store.deleteSelectedDesc: {{count}} user presets will be removed permanently.
store.exportEmpty: There are no presets to export
store.importDesc: Import one or many user presets from a URL or a local JSON file.
store.importUrlRequired: Enter a reachable JSON URL first
store.importFailed: Import failed. Check whether the JSON matches the current schema.
store.emptyDesc: Create your own preset or import one from an external JSON file.
store.searchEmptyDesc: Try another keyword, or create/import a preset first.

browserContext.title: Browser context policy
browserContext.desc: Controls how this assistant uses automatic browser context without mutating the assistant schema.
browserContext.inheritHint: The assistant currently resolves through tag rules or defaults. Preview: {{profileTitle}} ({{profileId}}).
browserContext.disabledHint: This assistant will not inject automatic browser context, but selection and element tools still work.
browserContext.profileHint: Pin a builtin profile for this assistant.

assistant.enableMemoryDesc: Allow this assistant to search and use global memory when needed.
assistant.enableMemoryUnavailable: Enable and configure Global Memory in Settings first.

builtinDefault.name: Default Assistant
builtinDefault.description: The unified default assistant for everyday Q&A, organization, writing, and general collaboration
builtinDefault.prompt: You are Olyq's default assistant. Ground your work in the user's request, attachments, and explicitly provided context. If the conversation also includes page content, selected text, or other materials, treat them as supplemental evidence rather than a default assumption. If important information is missing, say what is missing instead of presenting guesses as facts.
